Hydro point distribution

Set purity and sliders, click bubbles to allocate. Mark appearance mutations for +2/skill. Target 60 combined.

Mutation enzyme guide (swgpets.com)
Schedules (from Hydro Combos.xls)
Category → skills
  • Defensive — Survival, Bestial Resilience
  • Intellectual — Cunning, Intelligence
  • Aggressive — Aggression, Hunter's Instinct
Pool 0
Allocated 0
Unplaced 0

Spendable points = floor(purity). Purity does not round up. Top isomerase % accepts decimals (e.g. 89.33–90); 90% is the cap.

Temperature
5

0 = armor · 10 = DPS

Nutrient
5

0 = top · 5 = center · 10 = bottom

Ratio ~ —

Click a bubble to fill through it · last filled to remove one
